description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of the Uzi family. The receiver is rectangular with a prominent ejection port and a simple, robust construction. The grip is vertically aligned and textured for better handling, with a detachable box magazine inserted from the bottom. The barrel is short and protrudes slightly from the front, with a small cylindrical muzzle. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the rear sight integrated into the receiver and the front sight post visible. The overall finish is matte black, with subtle metallic highlights and minimal external embellishments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a boxy receiver, short barrel, and detachable box magazine. Features iron sights and a textured vertical grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, front sight post, and the circular muzzle opening.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the boxy receiver, ejection port, iron sights, and the full length of the magazine and grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear sight notch and the back of the receiver, with the magazine visible below.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the receiver details, magazine, grip, and the barrel protruding from the front.
